arts.ttl: Man United 'lining up stunning £125m bid' for La Liga superstar in a move which would rock world football
arts.sum: Manchester United are allegedly preparing to make a £125m move for Atletico Madrid forward Julian Alvarez during this summer's transfer window

arts.ttl: Manchester United vs Spurs – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Manchester United travel to Tottenham Hotspur in the Premier League this afternoon as two struggling sides meet in North London. Ruben Amorim’s side are 14th in the table, just a place above a Spurs side who have also performed below expectations. arts.ttl: Amad Diallo breaks silence after Man Utd injury bombshell
arts.sum: Amad Diallo's become one of Manchester United's most influential players since establishing himself as a first-team regular.

arts.ttl: Antony's Man Utd recall option after Amad injury and ignored Ruben Amorim plea
arts.sum: Amad has been ruled out for 'some time' after sustaining an ankle ligament injury, leaving Manchester United and Ruben Amorim with a lack of options in attack - at a time when unwanted Antony is thriving in Spain

arts.ttl: Tottenham vs Man United – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur host Manchester United in the Premier League this afternoon. Both sides are looking to recover tough seasons, with Spurs 15th in the table and Manchester United just a place above them. However, the winners can climb to 12th with three points in North London. arts.ttl: Man United and Tottenham DISASTER ratings: Two of the Premier League's most underachieving sides meet, but who has it worse with injuries, the board and the players?
arts.sum: Tottenham host Manchester United in a bottom-half Premier League clash this weekend and, fortunately for one of them, they can't both lose.

arts.ttl: Man Utd make HUGE signing from PSG
arts.sum: Indeed, the Athletic reported this week that Manchester United are set to make more than 100 members of staff redundant in another cost-cutting cull of their workforce. United desperately need to improve their financial situation, with it very public in recent weeks how the club are unable to spend big in the market due to fears of not meeting the Premier League's financial requirements.

arts.ttl: Tottenham vs Manchester United – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Tottenham host Manchester United this Sunday with both sides in desperate need of a victory. Two of the recognised ‘Big Six’ clubs have endured woeful seasons. Spurs are currently languishing in 15th position in the Premier League with United only one place above them. arts.ttl: TEN memorable moments from Spurs v Man Utd
arts.sum: Cole pulled a goal back a minute into the second half before further strikes from Laurent Blanc, Ruud van Nistelrooy, Juan Sebastian Veron and Beckham saw a transformed Man Utd storm to a stunning win in a match of two halves. The result meant Man Utd had lost two of their opening three league matches for the first time in 26 years and was Mourinho's heaviest home loss as a manager.
